nodes.name: External / Internet
nodes.inferredFrom: Default boundary placeholder; markdown-viewer is a desktop Electrobun/Bun app with no network ingress, so 'External / Internet' has limited applicability beyond user file system and rendered iframe sandbox.

nodes.name: Internal / Application
nodes.inferredFrom: Default boundary placeholder; for a desktop viewer the meaningful boundary is renderer-process (DOMPurify-sanitised) vs main-process, not generic application/internal.

nodes.name: Node.js
nodes.inferredFrom: package.json declares engines.bun >=1.3.0 and scripts use 'bun run' / 'bun test'; runtime is Bun, not Node.js. No 'node' engine declared. Playwright CLI may invoke Node internally but Node is not the project runtime. Suggest replacing with component-bun and component-electrobun.

nodes.name: Playwright
nodes.inferredFrom: Confirmed via package.json devDependency '@playwright/test' ^1.48.0 and script 'test:e2e' using e2e/playwright.config.ts. Role is e2e test harness, not runtime observability — type 'operationalSignal' is loose; consider 'component' (test tooling) instead.

nodes.name: PostgreSQL
nodes.inferredFrom: Sole evidence is _cobolt-docker/docker-compose.yml service image 'postgres:16-alpine'. package.json has no pg/postgres/prisma/drizzle/knex client. Project is a desktop markdown viewer with no persistence backend. Almost certainly CoBolt scaffolding seeded via _cobolt-docker/, not a real dependency. Recommend removing from current-state graph or demoting to scaffolding-only.

nodes.name: Redis
nodes.inferredFrom: Sole evidence is _cobolt-docker/docker-compose.yml service image 'redis:7-alpine'. No redis/ioredis/bullmq client in package.json. Desktop viewer has no caching/queue need. CoBolt scaffolding artifact, not real runtime dependency. Recommend removal or scaffolding-only flag.

nodes.name: Docker
nodes.inferredFrom: Evidence is _cobolt-docker/docker-compose.yml plus a trd.md mention. Docker is part of CoBolt's local dev scaffolding, not a deployment target for an Electrobun-built desktop binary. Distribution is via 'electrobun build --release' producing native macOS bundles (per package.json description: 'Native macOS markdown viewer').

nodes.name: Render
nodes.inferredFrom: Render.com mentioned only in CoBolt-templated trd.md/prd.md. No render.yaml, no web service, no HTTP server in package.json. A native macOS desktop app cannot deploy to Render. Almost certainly a CoBolt planning template artifact. Recommend removal.

evidence.summary: fallback architecture-layer synthesis: operational signal observes matching runtime/artifact surface

assumptions: No source-level call/data edges were detected; relationship edges were synthesized from durable architecture layers and marked inferred. Add planning artifacts or source-level dependency evidence for confirmed edges.
Documentation artifacts were thin; APIs / services / entities were synthesized from the project source tree (api/, services/, schemas/, models/). Run the full brownfield pipeline for confirmed nodes.

Planning artifacts were absent; nodes were synthesized from the project tech stack (package.json / docker-compose / infra-manifest / language manifests). Run `cobolt plan project .` for evidence-backed diagrams.
No explicit API endpoints found; API map will show placeholder or skip.
No data entities extracted; ERD / data-flow diagrams will show placeholder or skip.

gaps.reason: No actor nodes extracted from available evidence.
No capability nodes extracted from available evidence.
No dataEntity nodes extracted from available evidence.
No api nodes extracted from available evidence.
No integration nodes extracted from available evidence.
No securityControl nodes extracted from available evidence.
Add actor 'End User (macOS local)' — primary and only human actor for a desktop viewer.
Add capabilities: render-markdown, render-mermaid-diagrams, render-katex-math, syntax-highlight, sanitize-html, parse-frontmatter, pan-zoom-svg, file-open.

Add component-electrobun (runtime shell), component-bun (JS runtime, replacing inferred component-node), component-markdown-it (+ 6 plugins), component-mermaid, component-katex, component-highlight-js, component-dompurify, component-gray-matter, component-svg-pan-zoom — all evidenced in package.json dependencies.
Add dataEntity 'MarkdownDocument' (file path + parsed AST + frontmatter) and 'DesignTokens' (referenced via scripts/design-token-check.ts). No relational entities apply.
No external integrations exist; mark N/A explicitly. Remove inferred Postgres/Redis/Render which are scaffolding phantoms.

Add securityControl-dompurify (HTML sanitisation), securityControl-katex-trust-false, securityControl-mermaid-security-level, securityControl-electrobun-renderer-sandbox, securityControl-bun-audit (CI gate via 'bun audit --audit-level=high').
Reclassify ops-playwright as test-tooling component, not operational signal. Add real ops signals only if found (none currently in package.json).
Replace plat-docker/plat-render with plat-macos (target platform, evidenced by 'Native macOS markdown viewer' in package.json description and gen-icons output) and plat-bun-runtime.

Remove or quarantine entity-postgres, entity-redis, plat-docker, plat-render — all four are CoBolt _cobolt-docker / planning-template phantoms with zero evidence in actual project source (package.json, scripts/, e2e/).

evidenceConfidence.rationale: 8/8 nodes are 'inferred' and 4/8 (Postgres, Redis, Docker, Render) are scaffolding phantoms unsupported by package.json or project source. The single confirmable runtime component (Bun + Electrobun) is misidentified as Node.js. Real architecture surface — markdown-it pipeline, sanitisation, mermaid/katex rendering, macOS desktop packaging — is entirely absent from the graph. Coverage of canonical entity types: actor 0, capability 0, component 1 (wrong), dataEntity 0, api 0, integration 0, securityControl 0, trustBoundary 2 (defaults), platformNode 2 (wrong), operationalSignal 1 (misclassified).

curatorRun.notes: Graph is dominated by CoBolt scaffolding noise (_cobolt-docker compose + planning-template trd/prd mentions); recommend a brownfield re-scan scoped to package.json + src/ + scripts/ + e2e/ to capture the real Electrobun/Bun + markdown-it + mermaid/katex desktop architecture before any diagram is rendered.
